author: @Nobody-s6g6r
text:
I remember showing this to my animation class during my sophomore year in college. While I did get a little self-conscious about all the more risqué stuff Danny and Aron talked about during this whole thing, I managed to get over it remembering that everyone in the room was an adult. 

Plus the teacher didn’t seem too bothered, and actually let me play the video from start to finish so the class could see all the different styles of animation. (She actually did some animation work on Robot-Chicken at one point, so she was probably used to this kind of crude humor) She was a very cool teacher
